cast.name: 菲利克斯·梅尔拜克 Felix Merback
Joshua David Smith Joshua David Smith
阿比盖尔·斯坦顿 Abigail Stanton

introduction: Ashton Heights is a psychological thriller set in an exclusive, highly guarded community where wealthy residents live under strict rules and constant surveillance after leaving dangerous pasts behind. When a mysterious newcomer arrives, long-buried connections and hidden tensions begin to surface. As suspicion spreads and the residents grow increasingly paranoid, one woman must navigate a web of secrets, shifting alliances, and unseen forces controlling life inside Ashton Heights, where trust is dangerous and nothing is quite what it seems.
